steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The stated goal is to “identify the institution in which Bucky is housed.” This requirement determines which information from the notes is relevant.

steps.title: Select the choice that directly answers the goal
steps.content:
Choice D directly accomplishes this by naming the institution: “Bucky is housed at the Children's Museum of Indianapolis.” The other three choices either discuss unrelated details (what Bucky is, when it lived) or address only the city rather than the institution itself.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
